title: Production Job sheets for workers
excerpt:
Is it possible to turn The Main Table - Groups with items into a printable work production sheet for the production staff in our factory? 
if not how do you make a production job sheet in monday from the workspace includ…

posts.author: t22design (shane)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is it possible to turn The Main Table - Groups with items into a printable work production sheet for the production staff in our factory?
if not how do you make a production job sheet in monday from the workspace including Groups and Items ?

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @t22design ,

Welcome to the monday community!

You can export to Excel and subsequently print any board ( and dashboard ) that is on monday.

You can learn more about that here.

Hope this helps!

Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: t22design (shane)
posts.cookedHtml: Why would I want to export the sheets to excel? thats just more work, Why cant Monday do this? Isn’t the Point of monday to stop using excel?

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @t22design

We have a production based client who set up a tablet with the monday.com app for their warehouse staff. They all can see/access/update the production statuses from the shared tablet by having filtered/assigned views etc.

Let me know if you needed to discuss further!
peta@upstreamtech.io
upstream

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
The exportation that I mentioned is in case you want the sheet to be printable. Otherwise, as @peta mentioned, it is quite possible and efficient set up the necessary infrastructure for all production staff to work with.

Let me know if you want to discuss this further!
